channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: WHO warns of critical shortage of medical supplies in Lebanon amid ongoing Israeli strikes
item.description: The World Health Organization (WHO) has cautioned that hospitals in Lebanon may run out of vital trauma care supplies within days, as Israeli airstrikes continue to cause mass casualties across the co...

item.title: Alberta separatist lawyer challenges First Nations' legal objections to independence petition
item.description: Alberta separatist lawyer Jeffrey Rath defended a provincial independence petition during hearings before Justice Shaina Leonard, urging the dismissal of legal challenges brought by three First Nation...

item.description: A statement delivered by former First Lady Melania Trump at the White House addressed previous allegations and reports concerning her relationship with convicted sex offender Jeffrey Epstein. The stat...

item.title: Understanding Knee Injections for Osteoarthritis: A Look at the Evidence
item.description: Knee osteoarthritis, a common ailment affecting over 8% of Australians, can lead to pain and mobility issues. While injections like corticosteroids, hyaluronic acid, platelet-rich plasma (PRP), and st...

item.title: A Review of Neha Sinha’s 'Wild Capital': An Insight into Urban Wildlife
item.description: In Neha Sinha’s book, 'Wild Capital,' the author presents a unique blend of environmental journalism and personal reflection, as she explores the complex interplay between urbanisation and the natural...

item.title: New Research Highlights Need for Reform and Choice in K-12 Education
item.description: Recent research from Canada dey spark plenty discussion among educators and policymakers, as e dey push for reforms wey go increase access to different learning options inside the K-12 education syste...

item.title: Poilievre calls for federal action to protect private land rights after Cowichan ruling
item.description: Conservative Leader Pierre Poilievre has called for an emergency parliamentary committee to examine all measures that could protect private land ownership in Canada, known as fee simple title. His con...

item.title: Mother Rejects Gifts from In-Laws After Daughter's Alleged Killing by Husband
item.description: Elis Sumari, a mother from Nasholi Village in Tanzania, rejected several gifts including a cow, two sheep, and crates of soda offered by her late daughter’s in-laws following the tragic death of her d...

item.title: Government embarks on irrigation expansion to boost food production in Turkana County

item.title: Axon show in Mexico City highlights integrated vehicle‑based policing tech for Mexican agencies
item.description: Axon held a Vehicle Intelligence Demo Day in Mexico City on March 23, 2026, to showcase how its connected technologies can improve public‑safety operations in Mexico. The centerpiece of the event was ...

item.title: Trump attempts to shift focus from Iran and Epstein scandal to immigration with controversial video
item.description: Amid growing scrutiny over his controversial stance on Iran and the Epstein scandal, Donald Trump has attempted to divert attention by posting a disturbing video of a murder, allegedly committed by a ...

item.title: Two men dead after violent dispute in Bihar market; police investigate communal tension

item.title: Melania Trump denies any relationship with Jeffrey Epstein and calls for public hearings with victims

item.title: South African tour guides study Mandarin to enhance Chinese visitor experiences
item.description: Thirty South African tour guides have completed Mandarin language training to improve the experience of Chinese tourists visiting the country. The programme, organised by the Department of Tourism in ...

item.title: Florida woman fatally attacked; suspect was a Haitian national under Temporary Protected Status
item.description: President Donald Trump shared disturbing surveillance footage showing a fatal assault on a 51-year-old woman outside a Chevron gas station in Fort Myers, Florida. The suspect, Rolbert Joachin, a 40-ye...
